{{Infobox concept
| name = Heartlander
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Heartlander Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Heartlanders are a group of people characterized by their dark skin. They originate from the Heartlands, a territory once ruled by [[Nakothi]] that is considered the birthplace of humanity. The lineage of all people can be traced back to an original Heartlander. Members of this group are seen in various social roles, including the [[High Gardener]] and leader of the [[Consultant assassins]], as well as individuals serving as [[Masons]] or members of the [[Luminian Order]]. Cultural traits associated with Heartlanders include wearing specific styles of clothing, such as soft shorts for sleeping or elegant dresses and silk garments. Some individuals from this group are noted for wearing extensive gold jewelry and gemstones, while others may wear distinctive headwear like wide-brimmed white hats.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel Petronus]] is a [[Heartlander]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Artur]] and [[Vorus Belfry]] are Heartlanders.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Heartlanders compete for status with the [[Erinin]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A half-[[Heartlander man]] is imprisoned in a cell filled with books.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Heartlander]] is a type of skin color found among dignified citizens in the [[Aurelian Capital]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Heartlanders can have pure black skin.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A dark-skinned [[Heartlander]] grabbed [[Shera]] by the throat.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heartlanders rule the [[Heartland]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Heartlander man]] was sitting on [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s bed.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Heartlanders are people from the Heartlands.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Heartlander man]] is seated opposite [[Calder]] in the mansion.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Heartlanders are natives with dark skin.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
